docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR MAR-19-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BADAWI, HESHAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WARWAR, MOSTAFA $9,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,900.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-19-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT WARWAR, MOSTAFA MAILED TO RESPONDENT BADAWI, HESHAM
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT BADAWI, HESHAM TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT WARWAR, MOSTAFA JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF MOSTAFA WARWAR AND AGAINST HESHAM BADAWI IN THE AMOUNT OF $0.00. C.C.P. 337 - 4 YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS ON CONTRACT IN WRITING. C.C.P. 339 - 2 YEAR SATUTE OF LIMITATIONS ON ORAL CONTRACT. C.C.P. 351 - TOLLING APPLIES TO ABSENCE OF DEFENDANT, NOT ABSENCE OF PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF DEC-16-2013. EXHIBITS ARE ORDERED RETURNED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGREIS, CLERK WESLEY RAMIREZ. DEPT 525. NOTHING REPORTED. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 75.0 - SERVED NOV-07-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WARWAR, MOSTAFA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2013 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MOSTAFA WARWAR ON FEB-06-2014 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY BADAWI, HESHAM WARWAR, MOSTAFA

THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF DEC-16-2013. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGREIS, CLERK WESLEY RAMIREZ. DEPT 525. NOTHING REPORTED.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
